'''MicroThrust Processors''' was a manufacturer of communications equipment, scanners, [[Computer/Legends|computers]], [[Computer spike/Legends|computer spikes]], [[Jammer/Legends|jammers]], chronometers, and sensors.

==History==
The company was created during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to supply communication devices for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic troops]]. Over time, it continued to work on military contracts and as much as two-thirds of their business came from these.<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
